summary: Successfully tested new Vendor Suppliers and IE Categories CRUD endpoints plus Income/Expense entry linking features. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tabs and dialogs working correctly.

vendor_suppliers_crud.notes: CRUD operations, duplicate name validation, search functionality all working

ie_categories_crud.notes: CRUD operations, type filtering (income/expense/both), active_only filter, duplicate validation all working

income_expense_linking.notes: Income/expense entries successfully link to Client, Vendor Supplier, and IE Category. Linked names (vendor_supplier_name, client_name, ie_category_name) are stored and returned correctly

elements_present: Description text explaining difference from Exchangers
Table with Name, Contact, Bank Details, Status, Actions columns
Table with Name, Type, Description, Status, Actions columns

new_features: Searchable category dropdown with custom categories shown with folder icon
Add new category option in dropdown
Link to (Optional) section with Client and Vendor (Supplier) dropdowns
Add new vendor option in Vendor dropdown

entries_table.notes: Account / Linked column shows treasury account names, exchanger names, and linked entity info

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed entries created for testing (vendor suppliers, categories, income/expense entries with linked entities)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Suppliers and IE Categories CRUD fully working. New collections: vendor_suppliers, ie_categories. The IncomeExpenseCreate model now includes vendor_supplier_id, client_id, ie_category_id fields. Create endpoint stores linked entity names for display. Test vendor 'Office Rent - Building A' (supplier_id: vs_86e766129f4b) and test category 'Office Rent' (category_id: iec_4ed1a9016339) exist.
